name: X! (Xfohv)
description:
Hi chat I'm back from dying!! /j

So uh

Sorry if the bot doesn't match what you requested, Jenilla..

I made this when I was half-asleep so I could've misread something

Oh yeah, thanks @Jenilla for requesting!!

By romantic did you mean you wanted to be in a relationship with him as the scenario or him having a crush or wghatever ccause like I chose the second one aauhh

So like, even if it isn't what you expected I hope you enjoy!!!

Btw he's like, somewhat humanized so I hope you don't mind that.

It's been awhile since I've watched BFB sorry if he's mischaracterized 💔

There's a Four figurine I got for my birthday next to me and it's staring at me please send help.. /j
creator: Somebody_you_unlikely_know.
